Interface Constructor

All Superinterfaces:
AccessFlags, ClassTypeContainer, Member, Method, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConstructorDeclaration, ConstructorInfo, DefaultConstructor
public interface Constructor extends Method
A program model element representing constructors. Constructors are modelled as subtypes of methods and will return null as return type.
